text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, we've danced at the disco, had Italian food, and looked 
around some luxury brand stores! There's one last thing to do 
before we go…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And that's to enjoy the beach!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The weather's so nice! Being somewhere so spacious 
just makes me want to run!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh? In that case…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Tag! You're it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Run awaaay!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to let you catch me so easily!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: …! All right! I'll catch up to you all, you'll see!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Seeeven, eiiight, niiine, ten! Huuup!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I-I'm gonna get you! Huff, puff!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! How are they all so good at running away?! Change of plans! Time to narrow my focus down to one person!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eenie, meenie, miney, mo… There!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! Don't think you can outrun me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Huff… Puff!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Give it up and let me catch you already, Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm terrible at being it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! If you won't give up, I'll just have to try harder!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You're not getting away from me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, they're incredible! You can barely even see them anymore!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey! Just how far are you going to ruuun?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! They're both running great, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(The sand is so hot and the wind is cool on my face… 
This is so fun! I feel like I can go anywhere I want right now!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (I don't know why, but this feels so familiar…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. This is what it feels like to run! 
It's just about kicking off each step without 
thought, cutting through the wind…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (And simply moving forward!)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff… Huff! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've got you now!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Huff… Puff… Pant… Pant…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oof, I don't even have the strength left to be it now. 
I'm exhausted. You were chasing after me like your 
life depended on it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's only because you were running away as if your life depended on it! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. Aaah! That was fun.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My legs felt lighter than usual. It's been a while 
since I got so completely lost in my running.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …Yeah. Same here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Bubblyland has been amazing. It really did end up 
reminding me how to move again.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Running's just as fun as I remember. Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll have to thank Maruzen. And my mom too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'll have to apologize to my mom as well!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Did you do something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well… She kept telling me to go out and have fun, 
but I kept ignoring her advice… In the end though, 
she was right.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wonder how she knew exactly what I needed?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …Yeah. It's strange, huh?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Are you guys okay?!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: We're fiiine!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We've come quite far. We'd better hurry back. 
And while we're at it…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tag! You're it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey! That's no fair!
That night…
(Ring, ring, ring…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-Hello? Mom?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, Mama? You know, today I…
